description:
Every TaskServiceApi method is implemented twice in task_impl.rs — once for InMemoryServiceHub (lines 4-287) and once for FileServiceHub (lines 290-617). The bodies are structurally identical except FileServiceHub wraps mutations in self.mutate_persistent_state(). ~15 methods × 2 copies.

Related duplication:
- `metadata.updated_at = Utc::now(); metadata.version = version.saturating_add(1)` appears 18+ times — no `touch_metadata()` helper
- `OrchestratorTask` struct literal constructed with identical default fields in 3 places (task_impl.rs:55-93, task_impl.rs:352-390, planning_shared.rs:661-721) — no Default impl or builder
- `"task not found: {id}"` error string appears 22 times in task_impl.rs alone
- Same pattern exists in planning_impl.rs for upsert_requirement (normalization block duplicated)

Solution: Extract shared mutation logic into free functions that take &mut state. Add `OrchestratorTask::builder()` or Default impl. Add `TaskMetadata::touch()` method. Consider a macro or generic helper for the InMemory/File split.
title: Deduplicate InMemory vs File ServiceHub method bodies in task_impl.rs
